headline: Tutor Perini (TPC) Could Be 33% Undervalued Following Fresh Court Judgment
summary: Tutor Perini (TPC) is back in focus after a Philadelphia court imposed an additional $42.4 million judgment related to construction delays and subcontractor disputes on the dual-branded W and Element hotel project. See our latest analysis for Tutor Perini. At a share price of US$75.89, Tutor Perini has seen a 10.43% 1 month share price return but a 90 day share price decline of 8.95%. The 1 year total shareholder return of 55.33% and very large 3 year total shareholder return suggest momentum...
